title: Super Pow
hints: Notice that $a^{bc} = (a^b)^c$. Can you split the exponent into smaller parts?
Use the property $a^{10x + y} = (a^{10})^x \cdot a^y$. Process the digit array from left to right.
Maintain a running result. For each digit, raise the current result to the 10th power, then multiply by $a$ raised to the current digit, applying mod 1337 at each step.
